title: Big Globe Compat - Pale Garden Backport
description: This datapack adds compatibility for the Pale Garden part of Vanilla Backport and Big Globe
body:
This datapack adds the Pale Garden biome and mobs from Vanilla Backport to the terrain generation for Big Globe while also utilizing features designed by builderb0y for 1.21.4, but you know, for 1.21.1.

In Big Globe on 1.21.4, the Pale Garden is in the Nether and fits wonderfully there. This datapack however adds the Pale Garden as a cave biome, because I can't add custom blocks to make the pale netherrack generate with a datapack and it fits pretty well underground.

Sodium flags the built-in resourcepack from Vanilla Backport as incompatible, this can be ignored as Big Globe will set the grass/foliage colors.
